description: Add a deterministic retrieval policy: structured provider API first, then Jido web_fetch/Req/Floki, then Jido browser session or provider-specific Playwright, with remote Browserless reserved as an optional operational fallback. Persist retrieval_path, fallback_reason, blocked status, timing, and extraction diagnostics. Acceptance: callers receive one normalized result and source health can distinguish each stage.
title: Implement staged retrieval backend policy
